pairs.selection_rationale: IT Specialist resume highlighting 37 years of Enterprise design/engineering matched with a Software Engineer JD requiring analytical/software skills.
Accountant resume with 15+ years experience in municipal finance, ledger, and AP/AR matched with a Staff Accountant JD requiring AP/AR posting.
Senior HR Director with over 20 years experience in recruiting and HRIS management matched with a Recruiter JD looking for talent sourcing.
Chef resume showing food preparation, safety regulations, and POS operations matched with an Executive Chef JD in a multi-entertainment facility.
Engineering Manager resume with 25+ years experience in technical/project management matched with a Civil Engineering Project Manager JD.
Sales resume showing target achievements and business management matched with a Salesperson JD in event planning.
Creative Designer resume highlighting layout design and digital styling matched with a Dental CAD/CAM Designer role.
IT Manager resume with 15+ years experience managing technology, networks, and databases matched with a Senior Software Engineer JD.
Chef candidate with nursing/CNA focus applying for a technical Software Engineer JD; zero domain overlap.
IT Specialist resume with enterprise systems background applying for an Executive Chef JD; zero culinary overlap.
Civil Engineering Technician resume applying for a part-time hospitality/restaurant Recruiter JD; no relevant skills.
Accountant resume with Alexandria municipal finance background applying for a culinary Marriott Chef de Partie JD.
HR recruiter resume with human resource sourcing skills applying for a technical Software Engineer JD; no engineering skill set.
Chef/cook resume with fast-food prep experience applying for a professional corporate Staff Accountant JD; zero accounting overlap.
Sales executive resume applying for an Architectural Designer JD; zero CAD, modeling, or construction layout domain overlap.
Accountant resume focusing on financial reporting applying for a Dental CAD/CAM Designer JD; zero dental/design skill overlap.
Engineering Technician resume with general PC operating system and documentation experience applying for a Software Engineer JD.
Accountant resume highlighting intermediate SQL, database manipulation, and Excel macros applying for a Software Engineer JD.
IT Security Analyst with general technical context applying for a PHP-specific Remote Software Developer JD; has tech background but no PHP.
IT Specialist who managed technical training programs applying for a Recruiter JD; has human coordination skills but no HR background.
HR resume focusing on talent relations and hiring communication applying for a corporate Salesperson JD requiring strong travel/sales support.
Creative Designer resume applying for a Sales and Design Consultant JD; strong aesthetics overlap but lacks tiles/bath retail sales history.
Engineering Manager with heavy project execution background applying for a Construction Project Manager JD; strong manager, different domain.
Sales associate resume highlighting relationship building and outreach applying for a Recruiter JD; strong people skills, no formal HR training.
Engineering Assistant with documentation and project support background applying for a Commercial Construction Project Coordinator JD.
Designer resume focusing on general layout and graphic design applying for an Architectural Designer JD requiring custom luxury home design.
Senior HR Director with extensive executive coordination applying for a Construction Project Manager JD; strong executive lead, lacks site engineering.
General salesperson resume applying for a Natural Food Sales Associate JD; strong general sales skills, lacks specialized food domain experience.

notes: seed=42; 28 pairs stratified across clear_fit (8), clear_gap (8), and ambiguous (12). Prepared for rater sheet distribution. Rationales captured.
